title: Adjust console chat edge-fill without removing dashboard frame

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Restored dashboard frame padding and made only the workspace bleed to side/bottom edges using negative margins so chat touches frame bottom while preserving outer frame spacing. Verified with console-dashboard Jest test and dashboard typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusted console workspace to match evaluations frame behavior: removed negative workspace bleed margins so bottom frame remains visible, while keeping workspace non-rounded and full-height within the frame.
